# TrustShield AI

> AI-powered fraud prevention and digital trust platform for East Africa. Analyzes SMS, emails, and URLs and returns an explainable verdict (Safe, Suspicious, or High Risk) with confidence and recommended actions.

TrustShield AI is built for the EACA Summit 2026 Hackathon, Track 02 (Fraud Prevention & Trust). It focuses on phishing, SIM-swap, Business Email Compromise (BEC), and social engineering, and follows responsible AI governance: explainable outputs, honest confidence scores, human-in-the-loop, and minimal data retention.

## Pages
- [Home](/): product overview, features, AI governance principles, call to action.
